name: Ninjitsu Art of Duplication
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>分</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by Tributing 1 "Ninja" monster; Special Summon any number of "Ninja" monsters from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position and/or face-down Defense Position, with combined Levels less than or equal to the Level of the Tributed monster. When this card leaves the field, destroy those monsters.
eff: Activate this card by Tributing 1 "Ninja" monster; Special Summon any number of "Ninja" monsters from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position and/or face-down Defense Position, with combined Levels less than or equal to the Level of the Tributed monster. When this card leaves the field, destroy those monsters.
